title: Coffee Totem 3d
description: makes the totem a 3d cup of coffee
body:
This Rescource Pack modifies the texture of the totem of undying to be an cup of coffee, this really fits into the cozy aspect of minecraft. have fun!
if you find any bugs then please report them in the discord server.

![coffee mug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb9ed19d90420ac51ab00cee9bfedfed4b440ffb.png)

this rescource pack is made to go hand in hand with simply cozy

[![icon simply cozy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bed25c6b1b60add5d6837a7cf40a464eac02973_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-cozy)
